query: Predict Price of Nividia stock tomorrow
event_description: Predict Price of Nividia stock tomorrow
reasoning:
The downward trend with slope -8.0338 and maximum strength 1.00/1.0 combined with AvgTone of -3.473 (high conflict zone) and 100% Material Conflict classification creates strong bearish signal. Positive momentum of +5.0328 indicates the decline is decelerating but not reversing. GKG polarity of 7.18 confirms negative sentiment dominance. Forecast range [-240.216, -237.869] projects continued deterioration through the 30-day horizon, justifying probability below 35%.

Rationale: AvgTone of -3.473 indicates high conflict/negativity environment in Nvidia-related coverage. Trend direction is DOWN with strong slope of -8.0338 and strength of 1.00/1.0, indicating persistent deterioration. 100% Material Conflict (Q4) classification signals active negative events. Positive momentum of +5.0328 suggests deceleration of decline but not reversal. GKG polarity of 7.18 (negative_score 4.50 vs positive_score 2.68) confirms bearish sentiment dominance. Forecast range of [-240.216, -237.869] projects continued downward trajectory.
reflection_notes: Evaluation PASSED (Brier=0.0174). Probability estimate is well-calibrated. No further refinement needed.

consequences.consequence: By June 2026, Nvidia will announce 12-18% reduction in Q2 2026 data center revenue guidance, triggering $85-120 billion market cap erosion and causing NASDAQ-100 to decline 3.2-4.1%
By July 2026, institutional investors including Vanguard and BlackRock will reduce Nvidia holdings by 8-11%, reallocating $42-58 billion to defensive semiconductor positions in TSMC and Intel
By August 2026, U.S. Commerce Department will impose additional export restrictions on Nvidia's H100 and H200 chips to China, reducing addressable market by $15-22 billion annually

Nvidia options market 30-day implied volatility exceeding 65% with put/call ratio above 1.4, confirming institutional hedging against further downside to $95-105 price range

scenarios.label: Accelerated Decline

Material Conflict events intensify with regulatory investigations into Nvidia's pricing practices and antitrust concerns in EU and U.S. markets.

scenarios.label: Base Case
scenarios.description: Nvidia stock declines 11-16% through May 24, 2026 as negative sentiment persists with AvgTone remaining below -3.0. Q1 2026 earnings meet expectations but forward guidance disappoints due to inventory buildup and competitive pressure from AMD's MI300 series capturing 8-12% data center GPU market share.
scenarios.key_trigger: Continued Material Conflict coverage with GKG polarity above 6.5 and downward trend slope maintaining -7.0 to -9.0 range

scenarios.label: Reversal

AvgTone recovers to -1.5 to -0.8 range.
